paths.dayjs: Use the formatters in `@/lib/datetime` for display. dayjs is only allowed in files on the migration allowlist (see overrides in biome.json).
paths.@/lib/dayjs: Use the formatters in `@/lib/datetime` for display. dayjs is only allowed in files on the migration allowlist (see overrides in biome.json).

patterns.message: Only files inside app/ may import from app/. Routes are thin adapters; shared code belongs in features/, components/, or lib/. Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).
src/utils is dissolved (RAL-1286). Generic helpers live in @/lib/utils, infrastructure in @/lib, domain code in the owning feature.

paths.dayjs: Use the formatters in `@/lib/datetime` for display. dayjs is only allowed in files on the migration allowlist (see overrides in biome.json).
paths.@/lib/dayjs: Use the formatters in `@/lib/datetime` for display. dayjs is only allowed in files on the migration allowlist (see overrides in biome.json).

patterns.message: components/ is domain-agnostic UI and must not depend on features/. Move domain components into features/<domain>/components/ (RAL-1291). Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).
Only files inside app/ may import from app/. Routes are thin adapters; shared code belongs in features/, components/, or lib/.
src/utils is dissolved (RAL-1286). Generic helpers live in @/lib/utils, infrastructure in @/lib, domain code in the owning feature.

patterns.message: lib/ is the bottom layer (app -> features -> components -> lib) and must not import from features/ or components/. If this code needs domain logic, it belongs in a feature. Existing violations are on the migration allowlist (see overrides in apps/web/biome.json).
